books.title: Modern Robotics
books.author: Lynch & Park
books.desc: Kinematics, dynamics, and planning. Free video lectures and Python library included.
books.label: Read free

books.title: Introduction to Robotics
books.author: John J. Craig
books.desc: The classic first robotics book. Transforms, Jacobians, trajectory planning, and dynamics.
books.label: View book

books.title: Probabilistic Robotics
books.author: Thrun, Burgard & Fox
books.desc: SLAM, localization, and Bayesian state estimation. The bible for autonomous navigation.
books.label: MIT Press

books.title: Planning Algorithms
books.author: Steven M. LaValle
books.desc: RRT, PRM, combinatorial planning, and decision theory. Full book free online.
books.label: Read free

books.title: Feedback Control of Dynamic Systems
books.author: Franklin, Powell & Emami-Naeini
books.desc: PID, root locus, frequency response, and state-space. The standard undergrad controls text.
books.label: View book

books.title: Robot Modeling and Control
books.author: Spong, Hutchinson & Vidyasagar
books.desc: Rigid-body dynamics and computed torque control for manipulators.
books.label: View book

books.title: Optimal Control and Estimation
books.author: Robert F. Stengel
books.desc: LQR, Kalman filtering, and robust control in one place. Great for aerospace GNC.
books.label: View book

books.title: Fundamentals of Astrodynamics
books.author: Bate, Mueller & White
books.desc: Short, dense, legendary. Two-body orbits, transfers, and interplanetary trajectories.
books.label: View book

books.title: Aircraft Control and Simulation
books.author: Stevens, Lewis & Johnson
books.desc: Flight dynamics, stability derivatives, and autopilot design for real aircraft and UAVs.
books.label: View book

books.title: Linear Algebra Done Right
books.author: Sheldon Axler
books.desc: Vector spaces and linear maps without determinants first. Clean proofs for robotics math.
books.label: Author's site

books.title: Introduction to Linear Algebra
books.author: Gilbert Strang
books.desc: The most intuitive LA book. Matrix factorizations with geometric intuition. Free MIT lectures.
books.label: Read free

books.title: Convex Optimization
books.author: Boyd & Vandenberghe
books.desc: Foundation for trajectory optimization, MPC, and modern robotics research. Free PDF.
books.label: Read free

paths.title: Robotics research intern
paths.subtitle: Stanford CHARM, MIT MCube, Berkeley BAIR
paths.tip: Start with Craig for intuition, then Modern Robotics for the math. Probabilistic Robotics when you touch SLAM or state estimation.

paths.title: Controls & GNC
paths.subtitle: Flight software, estimation, optimal control
paths.tip: Franklin gives you the feedback loop basics. Stengel covers LQR and Kalman filtering. Boyd is essential for anything optimization-based.

paths.title: Manipulation & dynamics
paths.subtitle: Arms, grippers, computed torque
paths.tip: Spong is the bridge from kinematics to actually controlling a manipulator under uncertainty.

paths.title: Aerospace trajectory design
paths.subtitle: Orbits, UAVs, autopilots
paths.tip: Astrodynamics is short but dense. Read it twice. Aircraft Control connects theory to real flight systems.
